svg.title: Check 9b — Output × Injection Compatibility Matrix v2.0
svg.desc: 8-by-7 matrix mapping Axis-1 output representations (rows: pixel-video, latent-tokens, 3d-explicit, 3d-implicit, particle, field, action-seq, motion) against Axis-2 injection mechanisms (cols: data-only, aux-loss, sim-in-loop-train, sim-in-loop-infer, guidance-gradient, architecture-bias-soft, hard-constraint). Cells marked compatible with anchor methods (Sora, VideoPoet, PhysGen3D, etc.), rare (yellow), or incompatible (red). Per v2 spec line 141-150: pixel-video × hard-constraint, field × sim-in-loop-train, and 3d-implicit × sim-in-loop-train are incompatible.
svg.text: Axis-1 output × Axis-2 injection · anchor dissections in compatible cells

text.tspan: ✗ cells require §8 explanation per audit script

svg.text: • pixel-video × hard-constraint too high-dim for symplectic structure
• field × sim-in-loop-train redundant — field is the simulator output
• rare cells compatible in principle, no anchor method 2024-26
technically possible, no anchor in v2 corpus
